NAVAREA XIX 78/24

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  041830 UTC JUL 24
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 65-41.8N 007-38.9E FLOATEL ENDURANCE
 65-47.6N 007-31.2E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 66-41.4N 005-54.4E TRANSOCEAN NORGE
 73-31.8N 024-58.1E SCARABEO 8
 72-30.3N 020-18.4E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 65-08.8N 007-26.0E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　77/24
